title: Reset Device - Clear Trusted Devices - Clear - No
scenario: Verify that tapping "No" on the confirmation popup cancels the Clear Trusted Devices action and keeps the headset connected.
steps: 1. Start Lens App with a headset connected.
3. Tap on Reset Device tab. Verify "Restore Defaults" and "Clear Trusted Devices" fields are present with appropriate buttons and text.
4. Tap "Clear" button. A popup appears asking "Device power off is required... Do you want to proceed?" with "No" and "Yes" buttons.
expected: Popup closes, headset is not cleared, Reset Device tab remains open, and headset stays connected.
